```{=html}
<section id="home-professional-intro" style="max-width:1100px;margin:2.2rem auto 2rem auto;padding:0 1rem;">
  <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.62);border:1px solid rgba(205,195,235,0.34);border-radius:30px;padding:2.2rem 2rem;box-shadow:0 18px 38px rgba(118,110,170,0.08);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(10px);">
    <p style="margin:0 0 .6rem 0;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:.82rem;color:#7a78a8;font-weight:700;">Professional Profile</p>
    <h1 style="margin:0 0 1rem 0;font-size:clamp(2.2rem,4vw,3.4rem);line-height:1.08;color:#3f4066;">Sophia Sufei Chen</h1>
    <p style="margin:0 0 1rem 0;font-size:1.04rem;line-height:1.9;color:#5c5f7d;">
      Final-year Business Studies student with developing strengths in business analytics, marketing strategy, process improvement, and professional communication.
    </p>
    <p style="margin:0;font-size:1rem;line-height:1.9;color:#5c5f7d;">
      This ePortfolio presents academic projects, technical learning, reflective development, certifications, and evidence of continued professional growth.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>
```

---
title: "Home"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<nav class="home-side-nav">
  <a href="#home-about">About</a>
  <a href="#home-explore">Explore</a>
  <a href="#home-highlights">Highlights</a>
  <a href="#home-connect">Connect</a>
</nav>
```



::: {.portfolio-banner #home-welcome}
::: {.portfolio-banner-inner}
## Welcome to My Portfolio

A curated space to present my academic journey, project work, professional interests, and the experiences that continue to shape my growth.
:::
:::

::: {.home-hero-box #home-about}
:::: {.home-about-panel}
::: {.home-about-text}
# Sophia Sufei Chen

✨ Final-Year Business Studies Student | Business Analytics | Marketing Strategy | Process Improvement

🔗 Let’s connect on LinkedIn and explore my academic background, business interests, and professional journey.

[About Me](about.html){.home-pill .home-pill-main}
[Projects](projects.html){.home-pill}
[CV](cv.html){.home-pill .home-pill-cv}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sophiasufei-chen-389591233){.home-pill}
:::

::: {.home-about-image}
![](images/profile.jpg)
:::
::::
:::



## Explore More {#home-explore}

:::: {.preview-entry-grid}
::: {.preview-entry-card .preview-card-about}
### 🌷 About Me
A closer introduction to my academic background, personal story, and the experiences that shape who I am beyond the title on the page.

[Enter About](about.html){.preview-entry-link}
:::

::: {.preview-entry-card .preview-card-projects}
### 📁 Projects
Explore coursework, practical analysis, and business-focused project work that reflects both learning and application.

[View Projects](projects.html){.preview-entry-link}
:::

::: {.preview-entry-card .preview-card-skills}
### ✨ Skill Preview
A hidden preview page that highlights how I think, work, and grow — from business analysis to communication and process improvement.

[Open Skill Preview](skill-preview.html){.preview-entry-link}
:::

::: {.preview-entry-card .preview-card-reflection}
### 🌙 Reflection
Read what I learned through building this portfolio, completing projects, and shaping a clearer direction for my future.

[Read Reflection](reflection.html){.preview-entry-link}
:::
::::


## Profile Highlights {#home-highlights}

:::: {.home-card-grid}
::: {.home-feature-card}
### Business Analytics
Academic focus on structured analysis, decision-making, and business insight.
:::

::: {.home-feature-card}
### Marketing Planning
Experience developing customer-focused strategy and value propositions.
:::

::: {.home-feature-card}
### Accounting & ACCA
Practical finance exposure through internship experience and ACCA studies.
:::

::: {.home-feature-card}
### Process Improvement
Strong interest in operational efficiency, cost analysis, and profitability.
:::
::::

:::: {.home-contact-grid}
::: {.home-contact-card}
### 📫 Contact
✉ chensophia0921@gmail.com
:::

::: {.home-contact-card}
### 📱 Phone
+353 0876535880
:::
::::


## Connect With Me {#home-connect}

<form id="connectForm" class="connect-form">
<div class="connect-grid">
<div class="connect-field">
<label for="visitor-name">Name</label>
<input type="text" id="visitor-name" name="name" placeholder="Enter your name" required>
</div>

<div class="connect-field">
<label for="visitor-email">Email</label>
<input type="email" id="visitor-email" name="email" placeholder="Enter your email" required>
</div>
</div>

<button type="submit" class="connect-btn">Connect Me</button>

```{=html}
<div id="connectModal" class="connect-modal">
  <div class="connect-modal-box">
    <div class="connect-modal-icon">✉</div>
    <h3>Invitation Received</h3>
    <p>I have received your connect invitation 📧</p>
    <button type="button" onclick="closeConnectModal()">Close</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const connectForm = document.getElementById("connectForm");
const connectModal = document.getElementById("connectModal");

function closeConnectModal() {
  connectModal.style.display = "none";
}

if (connectForm) {
  connectForm.addEventListener("submit", function (e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    connectForm.reset();
    connectModal.style.display = "flex";
  });
}

window.addEventListener("click", function(e) {
  if (e.target === connectModal) {
    closeConnectModal();
  }
});
</script>
```
</form>

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const links = document.querySelectorAll(".home-side-nav a");
  const sections = Array.from(links)
    .map(link => document.querySelector(link.getAttribute("href")))
    .filter(Boolean);

  function setActive() {
    let current = null;
    const offset = window.innerHeight * 0.28;

    sections.forEach(section => {
      const rect = section.getBoundingClientRect();
      if (rect.top <= offset && rect.bottom >= offset) {
        current = section.id;
      }
    });

    links.forEach(link => {
      const target = link.getAttribute("href").replace("#", "");
      if (target === current) {
        link.classList.add("is-active");
      } else {
        link.classList.remove("is-active");
      }
    });
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", setActive, { passive: true });
  setActive();
});
</script>
```

```{=html}
<div class="guestbook-widget" id="guestbookWidget">
  <div class="guestbook-shell">
    <div class="guestbook-header">
      <div>
        <h3>Guestbook</h3>
        <p>Drop a sweet message here ✨</p>
      </div>
      <button class="guestbook-toggle" id="guestbookToggle" type="button">—</button>
    </div>

    <div class="guestbook-list" id="guestbookList"></div>

    <form class="guestbook-form" id="guestbookForm">
      <input type="text" id="guestbookName" placeholder="Your name" maxlength="18" required>
      <textarea id="guestbookMessage" placeholder="Write your message..." maxlength="120" required></textarea>
      <button type="submit">Post Message</button>
    </form>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  const widget = document.getElementById("guestbookWidget");
  const list = document.getElementById("guestbookList");
  const form = document.getElementById("guestbookForm");
  const nameInput = document.getElementById("guestbookName");
  const messageInput = document.getElementById("guestbookMessage");
  const toggleBtn = document.getElementById("guestbookToggle");
  const storageKey = "sophiaPortfolioGuestbook";

  const defaults = [
    { name: "Emily", text: "Your portfolio feels so elegant and personal — I loved scrolling through it 💜", avatar: "🩰" },
    { name: "Luca", text: "The design is soft, dreamy, and really memorable. It feels like you.", avatar: "🎧" },
    { name: "Sophie", text: "Welcome to my little corner of the internet ✨ Thanks for being here.", avatar: "🌷" },
    { name: "Mia", text: "The About page and Behind the CV section are my favorite parts so far!", avatar: "☁️" },
    { name: "Noah", text: "This space feels warm, thoughtful, and full of personality.", avatar: "🫶" }
  ];

  function getMessages() {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(storageKey);
      if (!raw) return defaults;
      const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
      return Array.isArray(parsed) && parsed.length ? parsed : defaults;
    } catch (e) {
      return defaults;
    }
  }

  function saveMessages(messages) {
    localStorage.setItem(storageKey, JSON.stringify(messages));
  }

  const avatarPool = ["🩰","🎀","🌷","☁️","🫶","🎧","✨","🫧","🍓","🐰","🌙","🧸"];

  function pickAvatar(name) {
    if (!name) return "💬";
    let sum = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < name.length; i++) sum += name.charCodeAt(i);
    return avatarPool[sum % avatarPool.length];
  }

  function renderMessages() {
    const messages = getMessages();
    list.innerHTML = messages.map((item, index) => {
      const side = index % 2 === 0 ? "left" : "right";
      return `
        <div class="guestbook-bubble ${side}">
          <div class="guestbook-avatar">${item.avatar || pickAvatar(item.name)}</div>
          <div class="guestbook-content">
            <div class="guestbook-name">${item.name}</div>
            <div class="guestbook-text">${item.text}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      `;
    }).join("");
  }

  form.addEventListener("submit", function (e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const name = nameInput.value.trim();
    const text = messageInput.value.trim();
    if (!name || !text) return;

    const messages = getMessages();
    messages.push({ name, text, avatar: pickAvatar(name) });
    saveMessages(messages);
    renderMessages();
    form.reset();
  });

  toggleBtn.addEventListener("click", function () {
    widget.classList.toggle("is-collapsed");
    toggleBtn.textContent = widget.classList.contains("is-collapsed") ? "+" : "—";
  });

  renderMessages();
})();
</script>
```


```{=html}
<style>
/* ===== FINAL NAVY + LIGHT BLUE OVERRIDE ===== */
#quarto-header,
#quarto-header .navbar,
.navbar,
.navbar-expand-lg,
.navbar.navbar-expand-lg,
.headroom,
.headroom--pinned,
.headroom--unpinned {
  background: #163458 !important;
  background-color: #163458 !important;
  background-image: none !important;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(17,39,67,0.18) !important;
  border: none !important;
}

#quarto-header *,
.navbar *,
.navbar-brand,
.navbar-brand .menu-text,
.navbar-nav .nav-link,
.navbar-nav .nav-link .menu-text,
.navbar .nav-link,
.navbar .nav-link .menu-text,
.navbar .navbar-title,
.navbar .title,
.menu-text {
  color: #ffffff !important;
}

html, body, main.content, .page-columns, .page-full, .column-page, #quarto-content {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #eef3f8, #e7eef6) !important;
  color: #5c6b7a !important;
}

.preview-entry-card,
.home-feature-card,
.home-contact-card,
.connect-form,
.guestbook-shell,
.reflection-hero,
.reflection-card,
.certificate-hero,
.certificate-card,
#home-about .home-about-panel,
#home-about .home-about-text,
#home-about .home-about-image,
.panel,
.card,
.card-body,
.callout,
.callout-note,
.callout-tip,
.callout-important,
div[style*="background:rgba(255,255,255"],
div[style*="background: rgba(255,255,255"],
div[style*="rgba(243,236,255"],
div[style*="rgba(241,236,255"] {
  background: rgba(236,243,250,0.95) !important;
  background-color: rgba(236,243,250,0.95) !important;
  background-image: none !important;
  border-color: rgba(176,191,210,0.38) !important;
  color: #5c6b7a !important;
}

h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6,
.title,
.quarto-title,
strong, b {
  color: #24364a !important;
}

p, li, span, label, small {
  color: #5c6b7a !important;
}

button,
.btn,
.btn-primary,
.certificate-btn,
.preview-entry-link,
#home-about .home-pill,
#home-connect .connect-btn,
.enter-home-btn,
a.btn,
a[role="button"] {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #163458, #234b78) !important;
  background-color: #163458 !important;
  color: #ffffff !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.16) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(24,52,88,0.16) !important;
}

input, textarea, select {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.96) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(176,191,210,0.42) !important;
  color: #24364a !important;
}

input::placeholder,
textarea::placeholder {
  color: #7b8794 !important;
}

.home-side-nav a {
  background: rgba(236,243,250,0.96) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(176,191,210,0.34) !important;
  color: #163458 !important;
}

.home-side-nav a.is-active {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #163458, #234b78) !important;
  color: #ffffff !important;
}

.guestbook-shell .message-card,
.guestbook-shell .guestbook-bubble,
.guestbook-shell .guestbook-message,
.guestbook-shell .chat-bubble,
.guestbook-shell .guest-entry,
.guestbook-shell .message,
.guestbook-shell .note-card {
  background: rgba(245,249,253,0.97) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(185,198,214,0.34) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(31,58,91,0.08) !important;
}

[style*="243,236,255"],
[style*="241,236,255"],
[style*="#7d74d9"],
[style*="#9a92eb"],
[style*="rgba(243,236,255"],
[style*="rgba(241,236,255"] {
  background: rgba(236,243,250,0.95) !important;
  color: #24364a !important;
}
</style>
```
